titleStmt.title: SII 26.549: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 549. (A.R. No. 519 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription, in Tamil verses, records that the ruler, called Parākramakkaiytavaṉ, Māṉakavachaṉ, Koṟkaivēndaṉ, Arikēsari, Vindaippōr-kaḍandapāṇḍyaṉ and Poṉṉiṉ Perumāḷ, finished the stone work of the gōpura at Tenkāśi within 6 years (cf. No. 536 above.) and died.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
celeṟiyavayaṟ teṉkāciyālaiyan teyvaceyalālec camainta tiṅkeṉ
ceyalallavataṉai yiṉṉamele virivuceyte purappāraṭi vīḻntavar
tampālevalceytu paṇivaṉ parākkiṟama pāṇṭiyaṉe § maṉattāl
vakukkavumeṭṭāta koyil vakukka muṉṉiṉṟeṉaittāṉ paṇikoṇṭa
nātaṉ teṉkāciyai yeṉṟum maṇmel niṉaittātāñ ceytu taṅkāva §
pūṇṭa nirupar patantaṉait tāḻntiṟaiñcittalaimitiyāṉun tarittaṉaṉe
pūntaṇ poḻil puṭai cūḻunteṉkāciyaip pūtalattiṟ tāntaṅkiḷaiyuṭa
ṉe purappārkaḷ centāmarai taṉ parākkiṟamakkaiyata
vaṉ māṉicuvacaṉ koṟkaiventaṉ paṇipavarākiyeṉṉāḷum viḷaṅku
vare kāṇṭaku cīrpuṉai teṉkācikkopurak kaṟpaṇiyāṟāṇṭil muṭi
ttukkayilai ceṉṟāṉakilecar patampūṇṭuṟai cintaiyarikecari vintai
ppor kaṭanta pāṇṭiyaṉ poṉṉiṉ perumāḷ parākkiṟama pāṇṭiyaṉe [§*]
Digital edition of SII 26.549 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
